package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_combines_unrelated_write_paths_via_action_string: Services that branch on action strings to implement many create, update, or delete variants in one method.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule170NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule170NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule170NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario170Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule170NegativeService, input Rule170NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
